title: Shadow Wizard Money Gang
description: The one and only Shadow Wizard Money Gang mod pack. Contains some magic/spells stuff with a bit of exploration/world gen stuff too.
body:
## What is this?
It's a Fantasy and exploration themed mod pack. New dungeons, Bosses, Items and small changes to world gen.

It's mostly inspired by Terraria and Vanilla Plus-like mods. The goal is to expand emptier aspects of the game like magic, enchanting, and adding specific classes. This project adds some optimization/QOL ([Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)) and fantasy inspired ([When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), [Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards), [Ultris Boss Expansion](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ultris)) mods to expand on the fantasy feel Minecraft used to have. There are also some mods that add to already existing elements of Minecraft like [Better Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettertrims) and [Deeper Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker). As well as that there are some world expansion like [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify).

See [Here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/shadow-wizard-money-gang-modpack/versions) for a full mod list of the each version :)


## What is the point of this?

1. Bring back Minecrafts fantasy feel in a modern way
2. Takes a funny meme and impliments it's ideas into Minecraft
3. Offer others another way to play Minecraft
4. Expands on the progression of Minecraft (Similar to Terraria)
5. New iterations/expansions of vanilla aspects (trims, enchantments, ores, etc.)

## Critical Info:
This can be run on a server and runs on mine as long as the mods are in the server. Some are client side and some are not. You can always load up the Modpack and look into the mod menu. It will list which mods are client sided and which are not.

Here is a list of the mods I recommend if you run this on a server with the Modpack, feel free to add your own:


- [Essential Commands](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential-commands)
- [Plasma Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice)
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)
- [Argonauts](https://modrinth.com/mod/argonauts)
- [Simple Quests](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-quests) (You’ll have to configure and add things to this one)

*I run these on my own server, they work well.*

## Mod Attributions
Some of the mods in this pack requires that credit is given, so credit goes to the following mods that are used in this pack:

- [When Dungeons Arise - Here on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise)
- [cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard)
- [Savage Ender Dragon[Forge/Fabric]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/savage-ender-dragon)
- [Farmer's Respite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite-fabric)
- [Mythic Mounts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mythic-mounts)
- [Redden's Stone Lanterns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reddens-stone-lanterns)
- [Roughly Enough Resources](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roughly-enough-resources)
- [Simply Houses](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-houses)
- [Tierify](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tierify)
